title: Extra Enchants Reworked
description: A Mod Of Enchantments For People That Like Magic Mods
body:
This Is The Extra Enchants Mod. Me And My Friends Had This Idea That If We
Would Think Of The Idea Of Mods Right, We Thought That New Enchants Would Be Interesting.
So I Made It A Reality By Spending 2 Months Coding Nonstop. This Was The Hardest Mod To Make.
I Would Appreciate It If You Try My Mod And Send It To Your Friends
